creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
(In reply to Hiroo Ono from comment #9)

devel/breakpad is not using MASTER_SITES=GHC and is therefore not affected by this bug. Whatever is causing it to fail to fetch is unrelated.

(FWIW, right now _all_ github downloads appear to be failing for me with "500: Internal Server Error")
